reason: The statement applies because Manoah, the father of Samson, demonstrates loyalty to Yahweh by following the divine instructions given by the angel of the LORD regarding the birth and upbringing of Samson. Manoah prays to the LORD for guidance, follows the instructions concerning his son's consecration as a Nazarite, and offers sacrifices to the LORD. Despite his initial doubts and requests for further confirmation, Manoah ultimately obeys the commands of the angel of the LORD, showing his faithfulness to Yahweh.
